name: yamlover-workspace
description: yamlover monorepo root. Install, test, and run the dev server from HERE (the project root).
comment:workspaces: npm workspaces: one `npm install` at the root installs every package and hoists shared deps (e.g. xxhash-wasm) into the root node_modules, which is an ancestor of the engine/parser source the server reaches into by relative path — so resolution works everywhere. tools/desktop is intentionally excluded so a normal dev install doesn't pull Electron; install it on its own when needed.
